message:
test(ext): add 20 extension integration tests on real storage paths (bd-mblr.2.4)

Tests all 6 extension crates (JSON, FTS5, FTS3, R-tree, Session, Misc) with
file-backed databases: store via SQL, close, reopen, verify with extension APIs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
